ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "form_no" TEXT /* Form number associated with the candidate's examination registration */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate's guardian */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Time of registration for the examination */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the examination */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the examination is conducted */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the examination (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the examination */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the examination in minutes */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the examination */,
  "exam_description" TEXT /* Description of the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate attending the examination */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination being attended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time when the candidate attended the examination */,
  "invigilator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invigilator who marked the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_invigilator_id FOREIGN KEY ("invigilator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination slot */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination associated with the slot */,
  "slot_time" TEXT /* Time of the examination slot */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for candidates in this examination slot */,
  "slot_description" TEXT /* Description of the examination slot */,
  "slot_status" TEXT /* Status of the slot (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examination_slots_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, invigilator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., exam schedule, reschedule) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who took the exam */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam for which the result is recorded */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exam result (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was published */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the candidate */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the candidate's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id")
)
